title: Deus Irae
author: Philip K. Dick and Roger Zelazny
card_summary: A collaborative post-apocalyptic novel by Dick and Roger Zelazny (1976). Set after nuclear devastation, a limbless painter undertakes a pilgrimage to paint the face of the Deus Irae (God of Wrath), the scientist who triggered the apocalypse. Blends Dick's theological concerns with Zelazny's mythological sensibility. 116 pages.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip Kindred_ Zelazny, Roger - Deus Irae - libgen.li.pdf
